last_evolution.summary: Add cross-provider LLM fallback and fast-fail on auth errors to prevent evolution stalls

changes_applied.reason: Evolution has been failing every cycle because claude-cli hits Anthropic API with invalid key and retries 3x on same provider with no fallback. Fix: fast-fail on 401 auth errors, add cross-provider fallback chain (claude-cli -> anthropic -> groq).

suggestions.title: Add GROQ_API_KEY for free LLM fallback
suggestions.description: Free Groq tier enables evolution to continue even when claude-cli or Anthropic API fails; eliminates single point of failure

suggestions.title: Re-activate dev.to publishing
suggestions.description: dev.to was responsible for $2.65 of $2.77 total earnings -- highest ROI module, just needs secret restored

suggestions.title: Add MEDIUM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN for dual publishing
suggestions.description: Publish same articles to Medium + dev.to; doubles article reach with zero extra LLM cost
